steps: "Submit formal tax reclaim request to Danish Tax Authority (Skat) for excess withholding on NOVO B dividend under DK-NO treaty",
"File claim using Skat's online dividend tax refund form, citing 15% treaty rate vs. 25% standard rate applied",
"Include documentation: custodian statement showing DKK 384,000 tax withheld, treaty certificate, and proof of Norwegian tax residency",
"Follow up with Danske Bank Custody to ensure proper treaty rate application for future NOVO B dividend payments"

references.title: Skat.dk – Claiming Refund of Danish Dividend Tax
